MY TAHOE HAS ONLY 40,000 MI. WHEN BRAKING THE VEHICLE SHAKES AND SHIVERS ESPECIALLY WHEN BRAKING AT HIGHWAY SPEEDS. I REPLACED MY TIRES EVEN THOUGH THEY WERE ONLY HALF WORN TO SEE IF THAT WAS THE PROBLEM BUT IT DIDN'T CHARGE ANYTHING. #2 COMPLAINT IS MY REAR DOORS FILL WITH WATER

narrative.headline: What 2014 Chevrolet Tahoe owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 93 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (16% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
